generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies in the Pacific are increasingly relying on us for their defense, while our own infrastructure at home is aging? A recent report shows that 68% of our key allies have reduced their defense budgets by an average of 12% over the past decade. Meanwhile, our own national preparedness scores have dropped by 15% in the same period. It's time to rethink our commitment to alliances and focus on securing our own future. #NationalSecurityFirst #AllianceRealityCheck
